name: Chocolate Oatmeal Cookies #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine melted butter, sugar, cocoa powder, and milk. Stir over medium heat.
2. Bring the mixture to a full boil for 3-4 minutes, aiming for almost a fudge consistency.
3. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter and vanilla.
4. Quickly stir in oatmeal.
5. Scoop dough onto aluminum foil using about 1 tablespoon per cookie.
6. Allow cookies to cool and harden before serving. Enjoy your chocolate fix!
